name: signet
description: Signet - agent-native release network + Playground on Sui + Walrus. Root orchestration.

scripts.dev:all: node scripts/gen-web-config.mjs && concurrently -k -n llm,sponsor,salt,portal,indexer,web "npm --prefix server/llm-proxy start" "npm --prefix server/sponsor start" "npm --prefix server/salt start" "npm --prefix server/portal start" "npm --prefix server start" "npx serve web -l 8080"
scripts.ci:local: npm --prefix app run typecheck && npm --prefix app test && npm --prefix server run typecheck && node --test server/salt/salt.test.mjs && node --test server/sponsor/sponsor.test.mjs && node --test server/portal/inliner.test.mjs && npm run test:e2e && npm run coverage
